documents.text: export const sortUsers = (users: User[]) => [...users].sort((a, b) => a.lastName.localeCompare(b.lastName));

export const slugify = (title: string) =>
  title.toLowerCase().normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');

import csv
def export_rows(path, rows):
    with open(path, 'w', newline='') as output:
        writer = csv.DictWriter(output, fieldnames=['name', 'email'])
        writer.writeheader()
        writer.writerows(rows)

import time
from collections import defaultdict

class FixedWindowLimiter:
    def __init__(self, limit, window_seconds=60):
        self.limit = limit
        self.window = window_seconds
        self.counts = defaultdict(int)

    def allow(self, key):
        window = int(time.time() // self.window)
        bucket = (key, window)
        if self.counts[bucket] >= self.limit:
            return False
        self.counts[bucket] += 1
        return True

name: focused-tests
on: [push]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with: { go-version: '1.25' }
      - run: go test ./internal/benchmark

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata: { name: search-api }
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: example/search:latest
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet: { path: /ready, port: 8080 }

theme:
  palette:
    background: '#101418'
    foreground: '#e8edf2'
  typography:
    family: Inter
    scale: 1.125

services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 5s
      retries: 10
volumes:
  pgdata: {}

name: release
on:
  push:
    tags: ['v*']
jobs:
  publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions: { contents: write }
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with: { go-version: '1.25' }
      - run: goreleaser release --clean
        env: { GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} }

groups:
  - name: api-availability
    rules:
      - alert: HighErrorRate
        expr: sum(rate(http_requests_total{code=~"5.."}[5m])) / sum(rate(http_requests_total[5m])) > 0.05
        for: 10m
        labels: { severity: page }
        annotations:
          summary: More than 5% of requests are failing

# Embedding configuration
Set the provider, model, vector dimensions, and context window in the project configuration. Query and document templates can wrap `{{text}}` for retrieval-specific models. Keep credentials in environment variables rather than source control.

# Semantic search
The search command embeds the query, compares it with indexed code chunks, applies path and language filters, and returns the closest matches. Increase the result limit when exploring several implementations of the same behavior.

# Release checklist
Update the version, summarize user-facing changes, create the signed tag, publish artifacts, and verify package checksums before announcing the release.

# Troubleshooting the embedding provider
If indexing fails with connection refused, confirm the Ollama server is running and that the configured host and port match. Pull the embedding model before indexing, then re-run the warmup command. A slow first request usually means the model is still loading into memory.

# Contributing
Fork the repository, create a topic branch, and keep commits focused. Run the linters and the full test suite before opening a pull request, and describe user-facing changes in the changelog entry.

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
stamp=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
tar -czf "backup-$stamp.tar.gz" -- data/
find . -name 'backup-*.tar.gz' -mtime +7 -delete

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
for attempt in 1 2 3 4 5; do
  if curl --fail --silent http://localhost:8080/ready >/dev/null; then exit 0; fi
  sleep "$attempt"
done
exit 1

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
gofmt -w ./cmd ./internal
prettier --write 'web/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}'

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
: "${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL must be set}"
for file in migrations/*.sql; do
  name=$(basename "$file")
  if psql "$DATABASE_URL" -tAc "select 1 from schema_migrations where name = '$name'" | grep -q 1; then
    continue
  fi
  echo "applying $name"
  psql "$DATABASE_URL" --single-transaction -f "$file"
  psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "insert into schema_migrations (name) values ('$name')"
done

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
host=$1
port=$2
deadline=$(( $(date +%s) + 30 ))
until nc -z "$host" "$port" 2>/dev/null; do
  if [ "$(date +%s)" -gt "$deadline" ]; then
    echo "timed out waiting for $host:$port" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  sleep 1
done

select c.id, c.name, sum(o.total_cents) as revenue_cents
from customers c
join orders o on o.customer_id = c.id
where o.status = 'paid'
  and o.created_at >= now() - interval '90 days'
group by c.id, c.name
order by revenue_cents desc
limit 20;

insert into plans (code, name, monthly_cents) values
    ('free', 'Free', 0),
    ('pro', 'Pro', 1900),
    ('team', 'Team', 4900)
on conflict (code) do nothing;

[package]
name = "chunker"
version = "0.4.2"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
toml = "0.8"

[profile.release]
lto = "thin"
codegen-units = 1
opt-level = "z"
strip = true

[project]
name = "ingest"
requires-python = ">=3.12"

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 100
lint.select = ["E", "F", "I", "B"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
addopts = "-q --strict-markers"
testpaths = ["tests"]

[editor]
theme = "gruvbox-dark"
line-numbers = "relative"
rulers = [100]

[editor.cursor-shape]
insert = "bar"
normal = "block"

FROM golang:1.25-alpine AS build
WORKDIR /src
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -ldflags='-s -w' -o /out/server ./cmd/server

FROM scratch
COPY --from=build /out/server /server
COPY --from=build /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt /etc/ssl/certs/
ENTRYPOINT ["/server"]

FROM node:22-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
RUN npm ci --omit=dev
COPY . .
RUN addgroup --system app && adduser --system --ingroup app app \
    && chown -R app:app /app
USER app
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

FROM squidfunk/mkdocs-material:latest
WORKDIR /docs
COPY mkdocs.yml .
COPY docs/ docs/
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ["serve", "--dev-addr=0.0.0.0:8000"]

resource "aws_db_instance" "primary" {
  identifier              = "app-primary"
  engine                  = "postgres"
  engine_version          = "16.3"
  instance_class          = "db.r6g.large"
  allocated_storage       = 100
  multi_az                = true
  backup_retention_period = 7
  storage_encrypted       = true
  skip_final_snapshot     = false
}
